packages.name: @nuclescript/presets
packages.description: Reference NucleScript pool, recovery, and pipeline presets.

packages.name: @nuclescript/profiles
packages.description: Illumina, Nanopore, and Twist hardware profile presets with recommended redundancy and measured error rates.
